properties.titulo_evento: Don’t call it a ‘quagmire’: defense secretary refuses to speculate on length of Iran war
properties.descricao: The questions over the war’s future come as a 60-day deadline approaches Thursday under the War Powers Act.

properties.titulo_evento: Trump says he discussed a Ukraine ceasefire with Putin
properties.descricao: Trump said he suggested "a little bit of a ceasefire" in the war in Ukraine during his phone call Wednesday with the Russian leader.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war has cost $25 billion so far, Pentagon official says
properties.descricao: Acting comptroller Jules Hurst III, testifying before the House Armed Services Committee, said that the bulk of the figure has been devoted to ordnance.

properties.titulo_evento: Drone diplomacy wins Ukraine valuable allies, but now it must deliver
properties.descricao: The Iran war has confirmed how central drones are to modern warfare and handed Zelenskiy a diplomatic trump card, analysts say.

properties.titulo_evento: Aligning the U.S. and Canadian Defense Industrial Bases
properties.descricao: The United States and Canada are both racing to rebuild their defense industrial bases, recognizing that future conflicts will be determined not only by military capability, but by the ability to produce at scale. But they cannot succeed alone ...

properties.titulo_evento: Could the US-Iran war become a protracted ‘frozen’ conflict?
properties.descricao: In the absence of a permanent deal, the war between the US and Iran is becoming one of attrition despite huge costs.

properties.descricao: Iran's Mehdi Taj-led delegation turns back at Toronto airport due to 'unacceptable behaviour of immigration officials'.

properties.titulo_evento: Oil prices soar on fears of long supply disruption, US siege of Iran ports
properties.descricao: US President Trump meets with oil firms over ways to minimise impact on fuel supplies amid US blockade of Iranian ports.

properties.titulo_evento: Hundreds of Ultra-Orthodox Jews protest Israel’s military draft
properties.descricao: Hundreds of Ultra-Orthodox Jews blocked a main road, as part of protests against Israel’s mandatory military service.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war live: Trump urges Tehran to ‘give up’; Ghalibaf mocks US strategy
properties.descricao: Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf ridicules US's economic pressure campaign as oil prices surge and Hormuz standoff continues.

properties.titulo_evento: Carney ‘strong’ in year one, now must deliver on promises in Canada
properties.descricao: Canada's prime minister has used Trump's attacks on allies and others to refocus Ottawa's foreign policy.

properties.titulo_evento: Israel has begun intercepting Gaza-bound Global Sumud Flotilla aid boats
properties.descricao: Organisers of a Gaza-bound aid mission say their vessels are being intercepted by Israeli military speedboats.

properties.titulo_evento: Arsenal cruelly denied penalty by VAR in Champions League draw at Atletico
properties.descricao: Arsenal scored one penalty, but VAR controversially denied them another in a 1-1 semifinal draw at Atletico Madrid.

properties.descricao: Kyiv requested that Israel seize the vessel and its cargo, take grain ‌samples, and question crew ​members.

properties.titulo_evento: Hegseth clashes with lawmakers over Iran war in nearly six-hour-long hearing

properties.titulo_evento: King and Queen lay flowers at 9/11 Memorial in New York
properties.descricao: King Charles and Queen Camilla on their state visit to the US visit the memorial in New York.

properties.descricao: Péter Magyar meets EU leaders in Brussels, for the first time since his Tisza party won a landslide election.

properties.descricao: Prosecutors argue Cole Tomas Allen should remain in custody until trial on a charge of attempted assassination of President Donald Trump.

properties.descricao: The UK has issued similar advice, telling citizens who stay, that they do so at their own risk.

properties.descricao: They are among nine people killed in successive attacks on Tuesday, which Israel's military says targeted a Hezbollah commander.

properties.titulo_evento: Stalemate in Madrid as resilient Arsenal Blunt Atletico Madrid in semi-final clash
properties.descricao: After a tight match, the Gunners and the Colchoneros parted on good terms with the score at 1–1, and will battle it out for a place in the final in London next Tuesday. Both goals in the match were scored from the penalty spot.

properties.titulo_evento: Middle East war live: Trump says US may cut troops in Germany as Iran row rages
properties.descricao: President Donald Trump said Wednesday that the United States is considering reducing the number of its troops in Germany, amid a row with German Chancellor Friedrich Merz over the Iran war. Follow our liveblog for the latest updates.

properties.titulo_evento: King Charles III visits Ground Zero, pledges 'enduring solidarity' with Americans

properties.titulo_evento: Russia scales down WW2 victory parade due to Ukrainian threat

properties.titulo_evento: Assad regime trials are 'integral for Syria to move on' from civil war, atrocities

properties.titulo_evento: 'Uncertainty but a lot of resilience' in Latin America, says IDB head

properties.titulo_evento: Iranian football officials leave Canada before FIFA Congress due to airport 'insult'

properties.titulo_evento: Israeli maps outline expanded zone of military control in Gaza

properties.titulo_evento: Armenia's foreign minister signals new era: Peace, EU ambitions, trade, 'huge' infrastructure plans

properties.titulo_evento: Viral LEGO-style AI videos blur line between entertainment and propaganda
properties.descricao: The LEGO-style videos making fun of Donald Trump over his war in Iran have racked up millions of views on social media. FRANCE 24's Tehran correspondent spoke to the content creator blurring the line between entertainment and propaganda.

properties.titulo_evento: North Korea faces food shortages as drought threatens crops
properties.descricao: The country's state-run news has said much of the country has been hit by an unusually severe drought. The largely isolated country, with a population of over 26 million, was already facing food shortages.

properties.titulo_evento: Whale 'Timmy' reaches Denmark in rescue effort — in pictures
properties.descricao: A barge carrying a humpback whale stranded in Germany for weeks has reached Danish waters on its journey to the North Sea.

properties.titulo_evento: King Charles commemorates 9/11 victims in New York visit
properties.descricao: The royal couple laid a bouquet at the September 11 Memorial and met with victim's families.

properties.titulo_evento: Mali: France urges citizens to leave amid Tuareg advance
properties.descricao: With Tuareg-led rebels saying the ruling junta in Mali will fall "sooner or later" and demanding the withdrawal of Russian troops, the French Foreign Ministry has called on French nationals to leave the country.

properties.titulo_evento: Russia to hold Victory Day parade without weaponry display
properties.descricao: The scaled back parade comes amid increasing Ukrainian attacks deep into mainland Russia, including the capital Moscow. The last time a Victory Day parade was held without weaponry display was in 2007.

properties.titulo_evento: Why Germany wants a seat at the UN Security Council
properties.descricao: With the rules-based world order "under stress," Germany is on a mission to gain a coveted seat at the United Nations' top table. German Foreign Minister Johann Wadephul told DW why diplomacy still matters.

properties.titulo_evento: Hungary's Magyar meets EU's von der Leyen in high-stakes Brussels visit
properties.descricao: Even before Peter Magyar takes office as Hungary's prime minister, he is looking to unlock €10 billion in EU funding ahead of an August deadline. Talks with Ursula von der Leyen come as part of a post-Orban EU reset.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany news: Cabinet discusses 2027 budget plans as Iran war threatens finances
properties.descricao: The Cabinet hopes to sign off on core points of its 2027 budget, so it can start to move through parliament. Germany already plans massive borrowing next year, before adequately factoring in Iran-based costs. Follow DW.

properties.titulo_evento: Why the ECB is in a tricky spot

properties.titulo_evento: Russia’s sports comeback fuels anger in Ukraine
properties.descricao: Ahead of a key meeting about curling, a top Ukrainian minister tells POLITICO he is "deeply concerned" about the trend toward readmission.

properties.descricao: There are 38,000 U.S. troops and personnel stationed in Germany, and cutting forces there would face opposition on Capitol Hill.
